docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT ORELLANA, JOSE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MADRID, NANCY ESMERALDA MAITA, JOSE ORELLANA, ALBERT ORELLANA, JOSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 924 CAPP STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $3,375.00 RENT, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,375.00, LEASE FORFEITED, JOSE ORELLANA TO PAY $1050 PAYABLE $500 ON 9-1-98 AND $550 ON 9-15-98. NANCY MADRID, JOSE MAITA, AND ALBERT ORELLANO SHALL PAY $2,275 OF JUDGMENT. PLUS COSTS PER COST BILL.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ORELLANA, JOSE

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. DAVID P. DAWSON, PRO TEM JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK MITCH LYONS, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: DAVID GROESCHEL, PLTF. ROBERT H. PETERSON, ATTY. FOR PLTF. ALSO PRESENT WAS DEFENDANT IN PRO PER, JOSE ORELLANA AND HIS FRIEND WHO ASSISTED IN SPANISH TRANSLATION, JORGE JIMINEZ, NOT A PARTY TO THE ACTION. 3:30 P.M. CASE SETTLED. SEE CLERK NOTES. STIPULATED JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JOSE ORELLANA. JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT AS TO THREE DEFAULTED DEFENDANTS WHERE DEFAULT HAD BEEN ENTERED ON 8/19/98. SPECIFICS IN NOTES.
